text.title: Common Automation Workflow Patterns
text.summary: Four reusable workflow patterns for lead capture, customer onboarding, content distribution, and weekly reporting.

rule.statement: The lead capture automation must fire within 5 minutes of form submission. Leads contacted after 30 minutes convert at 21x lower rates than leads contacted within 5 minutes.
rule.rationale: Intent decays rapidly. A lead who filled a form is in a buying moment. Automated immediate response preserves that moment regardless of timezone or time of day.

list.item: 1. Add to CRM or email list with tags from form data
2. Send welcome email with next step
Trigger: payment confirmed or signup completed
Trigger: new blog post published (RSS feed change)
1. Create Twitter/X post with excerpt and link
2. Create LinkedIn post with excerpt and link
1. Pull metrics from analytics, revenue, and product tools via API
